title: Claim Snapshot
description: Store-authoritative snapshot of the COMPLETE canonical claim set of one workspace/brand namespace at capture time (DEC-0013). Canonical claim membership comes from Artifact Store enumeration, never from a caller-supplied array: the snapshot binds its exact membership and validated per-claim contents through deterministic sha256 digests (algorithm claim-set-sha256-1.0.0: canonical JSON with code-unit-sorted object keys, no whitespace; content_digest over each validated claim artifact; claim_set_digest over the sorted pair array). Truth analysis records the snapshot it was derived from; compilation reconciles the snapshot against the live store and fails closed when membership or content has changed. A zero-claim namespace is a valid snapshot. No model, provider, or network field exists.

workspace.description: workspace namespace the claims were enumerated from; together with brand_ref it names the exact canonical namespace this snapshot is authoritative for

snapshot_algorithm.description: versioned canonicalization/digest algorithm identifier (currently claim-set-sha256-1.0.0, src/kernel/canonical-json.ts); a future algorithm change is a new version, never a silent reinterpretation

claims.description: one entry per canonical claim in the namespace at capture time, sorted by claim_ref in code-unit order (semantic layer); empty for a zero-claim namespace

content_digest.description: sha256 over the canonical serialization of the validated claim artifact

claim_set_digest.description: aggregate sha256 over the canonical serialization of the claims pair array; must equal the recomputation over the listed entries (semantic layer)
